idea-plugin.name: Koog Strategy Graph
idea-plugin.description:
Visualization for Koog agent strategy { ... } DSL blocks.

A gutter icon next to every recognized strategy(...) call renders the strategy as a Mermaid state diagram in the Koog Strategy tool window. The diagram is produced by Koog's own MermaidDiagramGenerator: the plugin lifts the strategy { } snippet into a temporary program, compiles it against your module, runs it, and displays the result — so the graph always matches Koog's real interpretation of the strategy. This requires the code to compile.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.5

  • The tool window now has an always-visible list of every strategy { } in the project (found via the IDE's index, so it's instant). Click a strategy to preview its graph beneath the list; double-click or press Enter to jump to its source, or use the right-click Open in New Tab to open it in its own pinned tab.
  • Graph tabs can be detached into their own floating window (the Detach to Window toolbar button, or the list's right-click Open in New Window), so several strategies can be compared side by side.
  • Added a refresh button to the tool window that re-generates the open graphs (and detached windows).
  • Graphs (and the list) refresh automatically after a project build finishes, so they reflect freshly compiled module output.
  • Reverse navigation: moving the editor caret onto a node declaration or an edge(…) highlights the matching node/edge in the graph — including subgraphs and edges inside them.
  • Strategies that are members of a class with non-mockable constructor parameters (String, primitives) now render: those arguments get a literal default instead of a mock.

0.1.4

  • Strategies defined as members of a class, object or companion object are now supported: the class is instantiated with mockk(relaxed = true) per constructor parameter, so member helpers and injected dependencies resolve.

0.1.3

  • Fixed unresolved references to sibling files/declarations when rendering a strategy in a Gradle-delegated module: the module's compiled output directories are now added to the compile classpath and friend paths.

0.1.2

  • Graphs are now rendered with Koog's own MermaidDiagramGenerator: the strategy { } snippet is compiled against your module and run, so the diagram always matches Koog's real interpretation.
  • Click a node to jump to its declaration, and click an edge (with a forgiving hit area) to jump to its edge(from forwardTo to) definition.
  • The graph refreshes automatically as you edit, keeping the last valid diagram while the code is incomplete.
  • Graph validation and compile errors are listed in a Problems-style panel without discarding the current diagram.
  • Strategy tabs are pinnable and closable, like search results.

0.1.0

  • Initial release: gutter icon + popup graph.
